method: 6 read-only audit agents, file:line reconciliation, fleet wf_3a62e82a-5c8
executive_verdict: Real polished frontend + real fast runtime with the ~50k-line agent spine sealed out between them. Vertical slice broken (FE speaks /v1/hide/* on 8744 to a hide-serve that no longer builds; live hawking-serve serves a disjoint surface on 8080). Every Hawking-native advantage exists as a real-but-unwired primitive; the 'pass state not text' moat is dead-ended below the product boundary.
